FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Hawkish FOMC Tone Supports Dollar Amid Mixed Yield Moves
tldr_points: FOMC minutes show hawkish tilt, supporting USD strength.
20‑year bond auction at 5.122% yield indicates solid demand for US debt.
US 10‑year yields down ~10bps, creating a mixed rate backdrop.
FX.excerpt: Hawkish FOMC tone and strong bond auction underpin USD upside despite slight yield softening.
FX.comment: Hawkish FOMC tone and strong bond auction underpin USD upside despite slight yield softening.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Nvidia's AI-driven rally lifts equities ahead of Fed minutes
Vanguard international ETF outperformance signals global risk-on sentiment
Technical alignment: price holding near MA20 with RSI indicating room for upside
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 poised for upside as Nvidia leads AI rally, Fed minutes awaited, and technical support aligns with bullish bias.
STOCKS.comment: Bullish setup based on AI-driven earnings, rate tailwinds, and MA20 support

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Adoption Surge and Derivative Inflows Signal Breakout Potential
tldr_points: Record tokenized assets and stablecoin infrastructure expand real‐world use cases for Bitcoin
$22.3M early inflows into Hyperliquid ETFs reflect growing institutional appetite for crypto derivatives
Technical setup remains neutral but bullish catalysts could push price above resistance
CRYPTO.excerpt: Fundamentals turn bullish as tokenization, regulated vaults, and ETF inflows signal institutional confidence in BTC.
CRYPTO.comment: Fundamental catalysts from tokenization, stablecoins, and ETF inflows support upside, with MA20 as entry zone.
